metadata.name: Cancel a Course Due to Low Enrollment

description: A department needs to cancel a course for the upcoming semester because not enough students registered.

nodes.task_description: Identify the course and verify its current enrollment number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that 'ART450' has only 2 students enrolled, below the minimum of 8.

nodes.task_description: Process the course cancellation in the SIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the course section.

nodes.task_description: Trigger automated notifications to the enrolled students and the assigned instructor, advising them of the cancellation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures all affected parties are notified.
